name: kylesadventureplanner-reliability
description: Reliability smoke tests and release gates

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static site detected: no build step required.')"
scripts.reliability:smoke: playwright test tests/reliability-smoke.spec.js tests/bulk-tag-undo-edge-cases.spec.js tests/adventure-achievements-smoke.spec.js tests/adventure-subtabs-smoke.spec.js tests/adventure-explorer-inpane-details.spec.js tests/adventure-inline-tools-roundtrip.spec.js tests/visited-enrich-modal-smoke.spec.js tests/edit-mode-global.spec.js tests/edit-mode-target-routing.spec.js tests/edit-mode-search-candidates.spec.js tests/edit-mode-submit-guards.spec.js tests/app-backup-flow.spec.js tests/nature-log-ux.spec.js tests/nature-map-context.spec.js tests/nature-subtabs-smoke.spec.js tests/nature-inat-import.spec.js tests/nature-inat-mapping-modal.spec.js tests/session-recovery-banner-regression.spec.js
scripts.reliability:prepush: playwright test --workers=1 --max-failures=1 tests/edit-mode-target-routing.spec.js tests/edit-mode-submit-guards.spec.js tests/visited-enrich-modal-smoke.spec.js tests/reliability-smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:production:assertions:triage: mkdir -p artifacts && PROD_ASSERT_ENABLE=1 playwright test tests/production-live-assertions.spec.js --config=playwright.config.production.js --reporter=json > artifacts/production-live-assertions-report.json && node scripts/summarize-production-assertions.js artifacts/production-live-assertions-report.json artifacts/production-live-assertions-summary.txt
scripts.test:production:assertions:writes:triage: mkdir -p artifacts && PROD_ASSERT_ENABLE=1 PROD_ASSERT_ALLOW_WRITES=1 playwright test tests/production-live-assertions.spec.js --config=playwright.config.production.js --reporter=json > artifacts/production-live-assertions-report.json && node scripts/summarize-production-assertions.js artifacts/production-live-assertions-report.json artifacts/production-live-assertions-summary.txt
